Title: I Am Greta
Writer: Hanna Lejonqvist, Per K. Kirkegaard, Olof Berglind
Actors: Greta Thunberg, Svante Thunberg, Niclas Svenningsen
Plot: In August of 2018, Greta Thunberg, a 15-year-old student in Sweden starts a school strike for the climate. Her question for adults: if you don't care about her future on earth, why should she care about her future in school? Within months, her strike evolves into a global movement. Greta, a quiet Northern-European girl on the autism spectrum is now a world famous activist. The team behind Greta has been following the young activist from her very first day of school striking.
Country: Sweden, United States, Germany, United Kingdom
